arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the App Mesh virtual router.

created_date.description: The date and time when the App Mesh virtual router was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the App Mesh virtual router.

last_updated_date.description: The date and time when the App Mesh virtual router was last updated.

mesh_owner.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the service mesh.

resource_owner.description: The AWS account ID of the resource owner.

spec.description: The specifications of the App Mesh virtual router, including listener and port mapping details.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the App Mesh virtual router.
